case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY H & H BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $101.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,101.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT. (CRC 522)
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GRANITE STATE INSURANCE COMPANY H & H BAIL BONDS
